role_title: Associate, New Verticals - Catalog Strategy & Operations

location.office_time_required: once a quarter in person; weekly office days for those in major hubs

level_signals: Base pay range $74,800–$110,000 consistent with early-career IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 1-3+ years of experience. You've succeeded in high-performing cultures (tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, startups or a related experience).
You have a completed Bachelor's Degree.

You're comfortable using AI tools to synthesize information, streamline workflows, and solve complex business problems. You have experience working with data, building insights, and communicating recommendations through dashboards and visualizations.
You embrace AI tools and emerging technologies to accelerate analysis, improve workflows, and drive data-informed decisions.
You solve problems from first principles. You're excited to think innovatively, and you resist "this is how it's always been done" thinking.
You are an operator. You don't hesitate to get in the weeds and operate at the lowest level of detail, but you're also able to think long-term.

scope.surface: Catalog pod within New Verticals — merchant onboarding automation, Grocery, Convenience, Alcohol, and Retail businesses
scope.business_model: marketplace (B2B2C); DoorDash New Verticals expanding beyond restaurants
primary_metrics_inferred: Operational efficiency across Grocery, Convenience, Alcohol, Retail
core_responsibilities: Identify ways to implement new technologies into merchant onboarding automation
Build strategic initiatives impacting all three sides of the marketplace
Advocate internally for product and operations solutions to enhance user experience
Lead cross-functional work streams to develop operating playbooks
Develop strategy for bringing local community to consumers with quality, speed, and accuracy
Create quarterly and annual plans aligned with product capabilities

green_flags: Hybrid model with flexibility — offices open but no rigid in-office mandate
Clear team mandate and product surface described
Role spans multiple high-growth verticals (Grocery, Convenience, Alcohol, Retail)
Inclusive hiring statement and accommodations process mentioned
red_flags: No equity or bonus information disclosed despite being a corporate role
Seniority band 1-3+ years is broad and somewhat ambiguous for leveling purposes
Cities listed as offices not specified for this role, making location expectations unclear beyond 'hybrid'

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Associate' and 1-3+ years requirement and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated explicitly)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from 'hybrid model' description and mention of remote jobs in NYC notice)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'Base salary is localized according to employee work location')
ambiguities: Location cities not specified for this role; the JD describes a hybrid model with quarterly in-person gatherings and weekly local office days in 'major hubs' but does not name which cities apply to this role.
Visa sponsorship is not mentioned anywhere in the JD — marked as 'unclear'.
The '1-3+' years range is unusual; the '+' after 3 suggests more experience is also acceptable, making the upper bound ambiguous.
